Exploring Cells Through AI

Red Blood Cell (Erythrocyte)

  • Unique biconcave shape
  • No nucleus
  • Size: 7-8 micrometers
  • Function: Oxygen transport

Plant Cell

  • Rectangular shape
  • Rigid cell wall
  • Size: 20-100 micrometers
  • Function: Photosynthesis

Bacterial Cell

  • Rod shape (bacillus)
  • No membrane-bound nucleus
  • Size: 2-3 micrometers
  • Function: Varies (can be beneficial or harmful)
